tinker.name: RegExp
tinker.description: Regular expression tester with real-time matching

zh-CN.name: 正则表达式
zh-CN.description: 正则表达式测试，支持实时匹配和语法高亮

get.description: Get the current regular expression pattern, flags, syntax error (if any), and match count against the test text.

set.description: Update the regular expression pattern and/or flags in the editor. Changes apply immediately and re-run matching against the test text.

flags.description: Optional flags: g (global), i (case insensitive), m (multiline), s (dotall), u (unicode), y (sticky)

get_text.description: Get the current test text used to evaluate the regular expression.

set_text.description: Replace the test text in the editor. Matching is re-run immediately against the current pattern.
